name: RDP + Tailscale + Dev Environment (Windows)

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      hostname:
        description: "Hostname for this RDP instance"
        required: true
        default: "bullet"
      ts_tailnet:
        description: "Tailscale tailnet (e.g. you@gmail.com)"
        required: true
      ts_api_key:
        description: "Tailscale API key"
        required: true
      ts_authkey:
        description: "Tailscale Auth key"
        required: true
      quick_test:
        description: "Run 5-minute test"
        type: boolean
        default: false
      runtime_minutes:
        description: "Runtime (max 360)"
        default: "355"
      do_purge:
        description: "Purge old devices"
        default: "true"
      rdp_count:
        description: "RDP instances (1-10)"
        default: "1"
      rdp_username:
        description: "RDP Username"
        default: "bulletuser"
      rdp_password:
        description: "RDP Password"
        default: "Bullet@12345"
      bonsai_api_key:
        description: "Bonsai API Key"
        required: false
        default: ""
      claude_api_key:
        description: "Claude API Key"
        required: false
        default: ""

permissions:
  contents: read
  actions: write

jobs:
  setup:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      matrix: ${{ steps.mk.outputs.matrix }}
    steps:
      - name: Generate matrix
        id: mk
        shell: bash
        run: |
          n=${{ inputs.rdp_count }}
          [ "$n" -lt 1 ] && n=1
          [ "$n" -gt 10 ] && n=10
          include="["
          for i in $(seq 1 $n); do
            [ $i -gt 1 ] && include+=","
            include+="{\"id\": $i}"
          done
          include+="]"
          echo "matrix={\"include\":$include}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

  purge-devices:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: setup
    if: ${{ inputs.do_purge == 'true' }}
    steps:
      - name: Purge old devices
        env:
          TS_TAILNET: ${{ inputs.ts_tailnet }}
          TS_API_KEY: ${{ inputs.ts_api_key }}
          HOSTNAME_INPUT: ${{ inputs.hostname }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          pattern="${HOSTNAME_INPUT:-bullet}"
          devices=$(curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $TS_API_KEY" "https://api.tailscale.com/api/v2/tailnet/$TS_TAILNET/devices")
          echo "$devices" | jq -r ".devices[] | select(.hostname | contains(\"$pattern\")) | .id" | while read id; do
            [ -n "$id" ] && curl -s -X DELETE -H "Authorization: Bearer $TS_API_KEY" "https://api.tailscale.com/api/v2/device/$id"
          done

  rdp:
    needs: [setup, purge-devices]
    if: always() && needs.setup.result == 'success'
    runs-on: windows-latest
    strategy:
      matrix: ${{ fromJson(needs.setup.outputs.matrix) }}
      max-parallel: 10
      fail-fast: false
    timeout-minutes: 370

    env:
      RDP_USER: ${{ inputs.rdp_username }}
      RDP_PASS: ${{ inputs.rdp_password }}

    steps:
      - name: Set hostname and runtime
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $hostname = "${{ inputs.hostname }}"
          if ([string]::IsNullOrEmpty($hostname)) {
            $hostname = if ([int]"${{ inputs.rdp_count }}" -gt 1) { "bullet${{ matrix.id }}" } else { "bullet" }
          }
          Add-Content -Path $env:GITHUB_ENV -Value "TS_HOSTNAME=$hostname"
          
          $runtime = 355
          try { $runtime = [int]"${{ inputs.runtime_minutes }}" } catch {}
          if ("${{ inputs.quick_test }}" -eq "true") { $runtime = 5 }
          if ($runtime -lt 1 -or $runtime -gt 360) { $runtime = 355 }
          Add-Content -Path $env:GITHUB_ENV -Value "RUNTIME_MINUTES=$runtime"
          
          Write-Host "Hostname: $hostname | Runtime: $runtime min"

      - name: Enable High Performance Mode
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          Write-Host "Enabling High Performance Mode..."
          
          # Activate High Performance (standard GUID)
          powercfg -setactive 8c5e7fda-e8bf-4a96-9a85-a6e23a8c635c
          
          # Try Ultimate Performance
          $result = powercfg -duplicatescheme e9a42b02-d5df-448d-aa00-03f14749eb61 2>&1
          if ($result -match "([a-f0-9]{8}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{12})") {
            powercfg -setactive $matches[1]
            Write-Host "Ultimate Performance activated"
          }
          
          # Disable sleep/hibernate
          powercfg -change -monitor-timeout-ac 0
          powercfg -change -standby-timeout-ac 0
          powercfg -change -hibernate-timeout-ac 0
          powercfg -hibernate off
          
          # Disable visual effects
          Set-ItemProperty -Path "HKCU:\Control Panel\Desktop\WindowMetrics" -Name "MinAnimate" -Value "0" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          Set-ItemProperty -Path "HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\VisualEffects" -Name "VisualFXSetting" -Value 2 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          
          # Network optimizations
          Set-ItemProperty -Path "HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Multimedia\SystemProfile" -Name "NetworkThrottlingIndex" -Value 0xffffffff -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          Set-ItemProperty -Path "HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Multimedia\SystemProfile" -Name "SystemResponsiveness" -Value 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          
          # Stop unnecessary services
          Stop-Service -Name "SysMain" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          Stop-Service -Name "DiagTrack" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          
          # Open firewall for code-server
          New-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName "code-server" -Direction Inbound -LocalPort 8080 -Protocol TCP -Action Allow -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          
          Write-Host "High Performance Mode ENABLED"

      - name: Install Tailscale
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $url = "https://pkgs.tailscale.com/stable/tailscale-setup-latest.exe"
          $installer = "$env:TEMP\tailscale.exe"
          
          [Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12
          Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $installer -UseBasicParsing
          Start-Process -FilePath $installer -ArgumentList "/quiet", "/noreboot" -Wait -NoNewWindow
          
          $tsPath = "${env:ProgramFiles}\Tailscale"
          Add-Content -Path $env:GITHUB_PATH -Value $tsPath
          $env:PATH += ";$tsPath"
          
          & "$tsPath\tailscale.exe" version

      - name: Connect Tailscale
        shell: pwsh
        env:
          TS_AUTHKEY: ${{ inputs.ts_authkey }}
        run: |
          $tsPath = "${env:ProgramFiles}\Tailscale\tailscale.exe"
          Start-Sleep -Seconds 3
          
          & $tsPath up --authkey="$env:TS_AUTHKEY" --hostname="$env:TS_HOSTNAME" --accept-dns --accept-routes
          Start-Sleep -Seconds 5
          
          $ip = (& $tsPath ip -4 2>$null)
          if ([string]::IsNullOrEmpty($ip)) { $ip = "unknown" }
          Add-Content -Path $env:GITHUB_ENV -Value "TAILSCALE_IP=$ip"
          Write-Host "Tailscale IP: $ip"

      - name: Install Chocolatey Packages
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          choco install -y git wget vim nano 7zip --no-progress
          Write-Host "Base packages installed"

      - name: Setup Node.js and npm
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          # Use pre-installed Node.js on windows-latest runner
          Write-Host "Using pre-installed Node.js..."
          node --version
          npm --version
          
          # Set up npm global path
          $npmGlobal = "C:\npm-global"
          New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $npmGlobal -Force | Out-Null
          
          # Update npm to latest version
          Write-Host "Updating npm to latest version..."
          npm install -g npm@latest
          
          # Configure npm global prefix
          npm config set prefix $npmGlobal
          
          # Refresh PATH with new npm global
          $env:PATH = "$npmGlobal;" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable("PATH", "Machine") + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable("PATH", "User")
          Add-Content -Path $env:GITHUB_PATH -Value $npmGlobal
          
          # Install global packages
          npm install -g typescript ts-node nodemon pm2 yarn pnpm
          
          Write-Host "Node: $(node --version)"
          Write-Host "npm: $(npm --version)"

      - name: Install Claude Code Latest with Bonsai Support
        shell: pwsh
        env:
          CLAUDE_API_KEY: ${{ inputs.claude_api_key }}
          BONSAI_API_KEY: ${{ inputs.bonsai_api_key }}
        run: |
          # Refresh PATH
          $npmGlobal = "C:\npm-global"
          $env:PATH = "$npmGlobal;" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable("PATH", "Machine") + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable("PATH", "User")

          # Install Claude Code via npm (latest version)
          Write-Host "Installing latest Claude Code via npm..."
          npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code

          # Verify installation
          Write-Host "Claude Code installed:"
          claude --version

          # Determine which API key to use
          $apiKey = $env:CLAUDE_API_KEY
          $baseUrl = $null

          # If Bonsai API key is provided, use Bonsai endpoint
          if (-not [string]::IsNullOrEmpty($env:BONSAI_API_KEY)) {
            $apiKey = $env:BONSAI_API_KEY
            $baseUrl = "https://api.bonsai.ai/v1"
            Write-Host "Using Bonsai API endpoint"
          } elseif (-not [string]::IsNullOrEmpty($env:CLAUDE_API_KEY)) {
            Write-Host "Using Anthropic API endpoint"
          }

          # Configure Claude for both runner and RDP user (skip login)
          if (-not [string]::IsNullOrEmpty($apiKey)) {
            $configDirs = @("$env:USERPROFILE\.claude", "C:\Users\$env:RDP_USER\.claude")

            foreach ($dir in $configDirs) {
              New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dir -Force | Out-Null

              # Create config with API key and settings to skip login
              $config = @{
                "api_key" = $apiKey
                "hasAcceptedTerms" = $true
                "hasCompletedOnboarding" = $true
              }
              if ($baseUrl) {
                $config["base_url"] = $baseUrl
                $config["apiBaseUrl"] = $baseUrl
              }
              $config | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 | Set-Content -Path "$dir\config.json" -Encoding UTF8

              # Create settings.json to skip onboarding
              $settings = @{
                "hasAcceptedTerms" = $true
                "hasCompletedOnboarding" = $true
                "telemetryEnabled" = $false
              }
              $settings | ConvertTo-Json | Set-Content -Path "$dir\settings.json" -Encoding UTF8

              # Create credentials file
              $credentials = @{ "anthropic" = @{ "api_key" = $apiKey } }
              if ($baseUrl) {
                $credentials["anthropic"]["base_url"] = $baseUrl
              }
              $credentials | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 | Set-Content -Path "$dir\credentials.json" -Encoding UTF8
            }

            # Set environment variables for both Machine and User
            [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", $apiKey, "Machine")
            [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", $apiKey, "User")
            [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable("CLAUDE_API_KEY", $apiKey, "Machine")
            [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable("CLAUDE_API_KEY", $apiKey, "User")

            if ($baseUrl) {
              [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable("ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL", $baseUrl, "Machine")
              [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable("ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL", $baseUrl, "User")
              [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable("CLAUDE_BASE_URL", $baseUrl, "Machine")
              [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable("CLAUDE_BASE_URL", $baseUrl, "User")
            }

            # Set for current session
            $env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY = $apiKey
            $env:CLAUDE_API_KEY = $apiKey
            if ($baseUrl) {
              $env:ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL = $baseUrl
              $env:CLAUDE_BASE_URL = $baseUrl
            }

            # Try to configure via CLI (accept terms non-interactively)
            try {
              $env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY = $apiKey
              echo "y" | claude config set hasAcceptedTerms true 2>$null
              echo "y" | claude config set hasCompletedOnboarding true 2>$null
            } catch {}

            Write-Host "Claude CLI configured - LOGIN SKIPPED"
          }
          Write-Host "Claude Code ready - will start without login prompt"

      - name: Create Admin User
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          net user $env:RDP_USER $env:RDP_PASS /add /active:yes /expires:never 2>$null
          net localgroup Administrators $env:RDP_USER /add 2>$null
          net localgroup "Remote Desktop Users" $env:RDP_USER /add 2>$null
          
          $profile = "C:\Users\$env:RDP_USER"
          if (Test-Path $profile) {
            icacls $profile /grant "${env:RDP_USER}:(OI)(CI)F" /C /Q 2>$null
          }
          
          Write-Host "User: $env:RDP_USER | Pass: $env:RDP_PASS"

      - name: Enable RDP
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          Set-ItemProperty -Path "HKLM:\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server" -Name "fDenyTSConnections" -Value 0 -Force
          Enable-NetFirewallRule -DisplayGroup "Remote Desktop" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          
          try {
            $ts = Get-WmiObject -class "Win32_TSGeneralSetting" -Namespace root\cimv2\terminalservices -Filter "TerminalName='RDP-Tcp'" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
            if ($ts) { $ts.SetUserAuthenticationRequired(0) }
          } catch {}
          
          $rdp = "HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server\WinStations\RDP-Tcp"
          Set-ItemProperty -Path $rdp -Name "UserAuthentication" -Value 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          Set-ItemProperty -Path $rdp -Name "SecurityLayer" -Value 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          Set-ItemProperty -Path $rdp -Name "fAutoReconnectEnabled" -Value 1 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          Set-ItemProperty -Path $rdp -Name "ColorDepth" -Value 4 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          Set-ItemProperty -Path $rdp -Name "BitmapPersistence" -Value 1 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          
          Restart-Service -Name TermService -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          Write-Host "RDP enabled on port 3389"

      - name: Install VS Code Server
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $npmGlobal = "C:\npm-global"
          New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $npmGlobal -Force | Out-Null
          
          # Set npm prefix BEFORE installing
          npm config set prefix $npmGlobal
          
          # Set PATH
          $env:PATH = "$npmGlobal;" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable("PATH", "Machine") + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable("PATH", "User")
          
          Write-Host "npm prefix: $npmGlobal"
          Write-Host "Installing code-server..."
          npm install -g code-server --ignore-scripts
          
          # Verify installation
          Write-Host "Checking installation..."
          $csCmd = Join-Path $npmGlobal "code-server.cmd"
          $csPs1 = Join-Path $npmGlobal "code-server.ps1"
          
          if (Test-Path $csCmd) {
            Write-Host "Found: $csCmd"
          } elseif (Test-Path $csPs1) {
            Write-Host "Found: $csPs1"
          } else {
            Write-Host "Checking npm global packages..."
            npm list -g --depth=0
            Write-Host "Files in ${npmGlobal}:"
            Get-ChildItem $npmGlobal -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name
          }
          
          # Create directories
          $userProfile = "C:\Users\$env:RDP_USER"
          $configDir = "$userProfile\.config\code-server"
          $dataDir = "$userProfile\.local\share\code-server"
          New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $configDir, "$dataDir\User", "$dataDir\extensions" -Force | Out-Null
          
          # Config file
          $configFile = "$configDir\config.yaml"
          Set-Content -Path $configFile -Value "bind-addr: 0.0.0.0:8080"
          Add-Content -Path $configFile -Value "auth: password"
          Add-Content -Path $configFile -Value "password: $env:RDP_PASS"
          Add-Content -Path $configFile -Value "cert: false"
          Add-Content -Path $configFile -Value "disable-getting-started-override: true"
          Add-Content -Path $configFile -Value "disable-telemetry: true"
          Add-Content -Path $configFile -Value "disable-update-check: true"
          Add-Content -Path $configFile -Value "extensions-dir: $dataDir/extensions"
          
          # Settings
          $settings = @{
            "editor.quickSuggestions" = @{ "other" = "on"; "comments" = "off"; "strings" = "off" }
            "editor.suggestSelection" = "first"
            "editor.wordBasedSuggestions" = "allDocuments"
            "editor.largeFileOptimizations" = $true
            "editor.minimap.enabled" = $false
            "editor.renderWhitespace" = "none"
            "editor.folding" = $false
            "editor.scrollBeyondLastLine" = $false
            "files.autoSave" = "afterDelay"
            "files.autoSaveDelay" = 1000
            "files.watcherExclude" = @{ "**/.git/**" = $true; "**/node_modules/**" = $true }
            "search.exclude" = @{ "**/node_modules" = $true; "**/.git" = $true }
            "terminal.integrated.gpuAcceleration" = "off"
            "workbench.enableExperiments" = $false
            "workbench.startupEditor" = "none"
            "workbench.tips.enabled" = $false
            "telemetry.telemetryLevel" = "off"
            "update.mode" = "none"
            "extensions.autoUpdate" = $false
            "typescript.tsserver.maxTsServerMemory" = 4096
          } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 | Set-Content -Path "$dataDir\User\settings.json" -Encoding UTF8
          
          # Permissions
          icacls $configDir /grant "${env:RDP_USER}:(OI)(CI)F" /C /Q 2>$null
          icacls $dataDir /grant "${env:RDP_USER}:(OI)(CI)F" /C /Q 2>$null
          icacls $npmGlobal /grant "${env:RDP_USER}:(OI)(CI)F" /C /Q 2>$null
          
          Write-Host "VS Code Server ready"

      - name: Start Services
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $npmGlobal = "C:\npm-global"
          $env:PATH = "$npmGlobal;" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable("PATH", "Machine") + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable("PATH", "User")
          
          Write-Host "PATH: $env:PATH"
          
          # Find code-server
          $codeServerPath = Get-Command code-server -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          if (-not $codeServerPath) {
            Write-Host "Searching for code-server..."
            $possiblePaths = @(
              "$npmGlobal\code-server.cmd",
              "$npmGlobal\code-server.ps1",
              "C:\Program Files\nodejs\code-server.cmd",
              "${env:ProgramFiles}\nodejs\code-server.cmd"
            )
            foreach ($p in $possiblePaths) {
              if (Test-Path $p) {
                $codeServerPath = $p
                Write-Host "Found: $p"
                break
              }
            }
          } else {
            $codeServerPath = $codeServerPath.Source
          }
          
          if (-not $codeServerPath) {
            Write-Host "ERROR: code-server not found!"
            Write-Host "Checking npm global packages..."
            npm list -g --depth=0
          } else {
            Write-Host "Starting code-server from: $codeServerPath"
            
            $dataDir = "C:\Users\$env:RDP_USER\.local\share\code-server"
            
            # Start code-server with full path
            Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList @(
              "/c", $codeServerPath,
              "--bind-addr", "0.0.0.0:8080",
              "--auth", "password",
              "--cert", "false",
              "--disable-telemetry",
              "--disable-update-check",
              "--disable-workspace-trust",
              "--user-data-dir", $dataDir
            ) -WindowStyle Hidden -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
            
            Start-Sleep -Seconds 8
          }
          
          # Check port
          $port = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          $portStatus = if ($port) { "LISTENING" } else { "NOT READY" }
          
          # Check node process
          $nodeProcess = Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          $nodeStatus = if ($nodeProcess) { "Running (PID: $($nodeProcess.Id -join ', '))" } else { "Not running" }
          
          Write-Host ""
          Write-Host "============================================"
          Write-Host "ALL SERVICES STARTED"
          Write-Host "============================================"
          Write-Host "RDP:          ${env:TAILSCALE_IP}:3389"
          Write-Host "VS Code:      http://${env:TAILSCALE_IP}:8080"
          Write-Host "Port 8080:    $portStatus"
          Write-Host "Node:         $nodeStatus"
          Write-Host "Username:     $env:RDP_USER"
          Write-Host "Password:     $env:RDP_PASS"
          Write-Host "============================================"

      - name: Keep Alive
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $runtime = 355
          try { $runtime = [int]$env:RUNTIME_MINUTES } catch {}
          if ($runtime -lt 1) { $runtime = 355 }
          
          $endTime = (Get-Date).AddMinutes($runtime)
          $i = 0
          
          while ((Get-Date) -lt $endTime) {
            $i++
            $rem = [math]::Round(($endTime - (Get-Date)).TotalMinutes)
            $time = Get-Date -Format "HH:mm:ss"
            
            # Keep awake
            try {
              $w = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
              $w.SendKeys("{SCROLLLOCK}")
              $w.SendKeys("{SCROLLLOCK}")
            } catch {}
            
            $rdp = Get-Service -Name TermService -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
            $node = Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
            $port = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
            
            $rdpS = if ($rdp) { $rdp.Status } else { "Unknown" }
            $csS = if ($node) { "Running" } else { "Stopped" }
            $portS = if ($port) { "OK" } else { "DOWN" }
            
            Write-Host "[$i] $time | ${rem}min left | RDP: $rdpS | VSCode: $csS | Port: $portS | IP: $env:TAILSCALE_IP"
            Start-Sleep -Seconds 60
          }
          Write-Host "Done at $(Get-Date)"

      - name: Cleanup
        if: always()
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $ts = "${env:ProgramFiles}\Tailscale\tailscale.exe"
          if (Test-Path $ts) { & $ts logout 2>$null }
          
          Stop-Process -Name node -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          
          Set-ItemProperty -Path "HKLM:\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server" -Name "fDenyTSConnections" -Value 1 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          Disable-NetFirewallRule -DisplayGroup "Remote Desktop" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          Remove-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName "code-server" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          
          powercfg -setactive 381b4222-f694-41f0-9685-ff5bb260df2e 2>$null
          
          Write-Host "Cleanup done"
